requires_subpages.reason: All data is embedded in the listing page inside collapsed <li> elements. Each item contains a <table> with full details including instans, dates, document links, and paragrafer. No subpage navigation needed.

notes: Page contains two separate bulletin boards: one for Tillkännagivanden (kungörelser + kallelser) and one for Protokoll. Only the first board (id='bulletinBoard12_4833936d17b32ba194323f9') contains bygglov-related items tagged as 'Kungörelse'. Items are collapsed by default (aria-hidden=true, display:none) but HTML is fully present in the DOM — no JS interaction required for scraping. Document links are relative and resolve to https://www.nordmaling.se/download/... for PDFs. Case numbers can be extracted from the PDF filename, e.g. 'SB-2026-45'. No address field is visible on the listing — address details may be inside the linked PDF.
